title: RapidMeta Oncology | PI3K / AKT-Pathway Inhibitors in HR+/HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer (NMA) v1.0
hero_h2: PI3K / AKT-Pathway Inhibitors in HR+/HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer (Alpelisib, Capivasertib, Inavolisib)
nyt_headline: The PI3K / AKT Pathway BC Evidence

pico.pop: Postmenopausal women with hormone-receptor-positive, HER2-negative advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression on or after aromatase inhibitor; SOLAR-1 + INAVO120 require PIK3CA-mutant tumour, CAPItello-291 enrolled all-comers and AKT-pathway-altered cohort
pico.int: Selective PI3K-alpha or AKT inhibitor: alpelisib 300 mg PO QD + fulvestrant (SOLAR-1), capivasertib 400 mg PO BID 4d-on-3d-off + fulvestrant (CAPItello-291), or inavolisib 9 mg PO QD + palbociclib + fulvestrant (INAVO120)
pico.comp: Placebo + same partner endocrine / CDK4/6 backbone (fulvestrant in SOLAR-1 / CAPItello-291; palbociclib + fulvestrant in INAVO120)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (PFS; primary in all three trials, time from randomization to documented progression or death; HR vs placebo)
pico.subgroup: PIK3CA / AKT1 / PTEN alteration status, prior CDK4/6 inhibitor exposure, visceral disease, prior endocrine therapy lines, age, geography

real_data_entries.name: SOLAR-1
real_data_entries.group: Alpelisib 300 mg QD + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in PIK3CA-mutant cohort, HR+/HER2- advanced BC; primary PFS in PIK3CA-mutant

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed PFS in PIK3CA-mutant cohort (primary; HR vs placebo + fulvestrant)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: André F et al. NEJM 2019;380:1929-1940 (SOLAR-1 alpelisib).

real_data_entries.name: CAPItello-291
real_data_entries.group: Capivasertib 400 mg BID 4-on-3-off + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- advanced BC, post-aromatase-inhibitor; primary PFS in overall and AKT-pathway-altered populations

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed PFS in overall population (primary; HR vs placebo + fulvestrant)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Turner NC et al. NEJM 2023;388:2058-2070 (CAPItello-291 capivasertib).

real_data_entries.name: INAVO120
real_data_entries.group: Inavolisib 9 mg QD + palbociclib + fulvestrant vs placebo + palbociclib + fulvestrant in PIK3CA-mutant HR+/HER2- advanced BC; primary PFS

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed PFS (primary; HR vs placebo + palbo + fulvestrant)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Turner NC et al. NEJM 2024;391:1357-1368 (INAVO120 inavolisib).
